sharedTypes.Card: { id: string; suit: Suit; rank: Rank; } // id format: '{rank}_{suit}' e.g. 'Q_spades', '10_hearts'

RuleVariants.moonGivesNegative: boolean // Shoot moon: -26 to shooter instead of +26 to others
RuleVariants.shootTheSun: boolean // Win all 13 tricks = double moon bonus
RuleVariants.bloodOnTheMoon: boolean // +5 penalty if no heart taken in round
RuleVariants.blackMaria: boolean // Q+K+A of spades all penalized
RuleVariants.endScore: number // default 100, game ends when any player reaches this

PlayerState.id: string // UUID for bots, socket.id for humans
PlayerState.hand: Card[] // empty array for opponents (server filters)
PlayerState.handCount: number // always populated, shows opponent card count

LobbyInfo.players: { id: string; nickname: string; role: PlayerRole; difficulty: BotDifficulty | null }[]

clientToServer.create_lobby: { nickname: string } → ack({ playerId: string, gameId: string })
clientToServer.join_lobby: { gameId: string; nickname: string } → ack({ playerId: string })
clientToServer.rejoin_game: { gameId: string; nickname: string } → ack({ success: boolean })

serverToClient.game_state: GameState // hand filtered: only current player sees their cards; opponents have hand:[]
serverToClient.round_complete: { roundScores: Record<string, number>; totalScores: Record<string, number> }
serverToClient.error: { code: string; message: string } // codes: invalid_card, not_your_turn, invalid_pass, game_not_found, lobby_full
serverToClient.chat_message: { playerId: string; nickname: string; message: string; timestamp: number }

restAPI.GET /api/game/:gameId/history: { rounds: { scores: Record<string, number>; winner: string }[] }

tables: players (id UUID PK, nickname TEXT UNIQUE, created_at, total_games, wins, losses, total_score)
game_sessions (id UUID PK, status, created_at, finished_at, rule_variants JSONB, winning_nickname TEXT, round_scores JSONB)
game_results (id UUID PK, game_id UUID FK, nickname TEXT, score INT, placement INT, hearts_taken INT, queen_taken BOOLEAN)

bot_card_weights (situation_hash VARCHAR(20), card_code VARCHAR(3), difficulty TEXT, weight FLOAT DEFAULT 0.5, play_count INT DEFAULT 0, version SMALLINT DEFAULT 1, updated_at TIMESTAMPTZ, PRIMARY KEY (situation_hash, card_code, difficulty))

keys.game:{gameId}: Full GameState JSON, TTL 2h (refreshed per trick)
keys.lobby:{gameId}: LobbyInfo JSON, TTL 30min, 5min after game starts
keys.player:{socketId}: { nickname, gameId, playerId }, TTL 60s on disconnect

HeartsBot.onRoundComplete: (roundScores: Record<string, number>, playerId: string) => Promise<void> // triggers weight updates for hard bot

conventions.playerId: socket.id for humans, UUID for bots

frontend.note: Use relative paths for API/Socket.IO: '/api/*' and '/socket.io/*'
